title: pelargonium × prophanon
intro: Pelargonium × prophanon, also known as Rooibos tea plant or a variety of Pelargonium, is a plant species that belongs to the geranium family. This plant is a source of Rooibos tea, which is used for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rooibos tea include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, as well as acting as an anti-aging agent and a natural remedy for digestive issues and allergies. Rooibos tea is often consumed as a herbal preparation, either hot or cold, and can also be used in skincare products due to its antiseptic and anti-aging properties.
